data.title: 国际服LINE Stickers表情包上线
data.summary: [A New Kivotos Inside Your LINE Chats?! The First Official LINE Stickers Arrive!] Sensei, the first
data.body:
[A New Kivotos Inside Your LINE Chats?! The First Official LINE Stickers Arrive!]

Sensei, the first official Blue Archive LINE stickers are here!
Use these animated stickers and discover another side of Kivotos in your LINE chats~ 🍀

➡️ Learn more: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=3036336
➡️ LINE Store: https://line.me/S/sticker/35472

#BlueArchive #BlueArchiveXLINE

![pic](images/timeline/lzBtaOB13k8CmoPb1pBEg2ca3Lvk1KSR.jpg?t=1752979763951)
